subcodes.first_line: Praise, hallowed beyond the mention of the Kingdom and the description of the companions of the Realm of Might, beseemeth the Lord of the Divine Dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر ملکوت و وصف اصحاب جبروت مالک لاهوت را لایق و سزاست
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
